summary: Completed testing of 3 priority features: Gift Certificate coupon code field, Interactive lessons navigation fix, and Gift Certificate cart integration. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Gift Certificate page correctly implements coupon code field with Apply button and discount display
Holiday lesson IDs correctly changed from short names (covenant, cradle) to full IDs (holiday-ae-covenant, holiday-ae-cradle, etc.)
CartContext.addGiftCertificateToCart function properly adds gift certificates to cart with all metadata
Two legacy test assertions fail due to order ID format change (FREE-* to SF-2026-*) - not a bug, just outdated test expectations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three features verified working: 1) Gift Certificate page at /gift-certificates has coupon code input field with Apply button - coupon validation works correctly (BETATEST gives 100% off). 2) Interactive lessons navigation fixed - holiday lesson IDs changed from short names to full IDs (holiday-ae-covenant, holiday-ae-cradle, holiday-ae-cross, holiday-ae-comforter) matching backend. 3) Gift Certificate Add to Cart button works - adds gift cert to cart with all metadata (recipient info, sender info, amount). Cart shows gift certificate item correctly.

backend_api_tests: Gift certificate types (book, mixup, tricky, subscription) validated
Nibbles list returns all holiday lesson IDs
frontend_ui_tests: Add to Cart button visible and clickable
Gift certificate added to cart successfully
Success toast shown after adding to cart
Quick Order page shows Holiday Series with correct lesson selector
Holiday lesson dropdown has correct IDs (holiday-ae-covenant, etc.)

gift_certificate_coupon_field.details: Coupon code input field with Apply button on /gift-certificates page. Validates coupons via /api/coupons/validate endpoint. Shows discount percentage and updated total.

interactive_lessons_navigation.details: Holiday lesson IDs fixed from short names (covenant, cradle, cross, comforter) to full IDs (holiday-ae-covenant, holiday-ae-cradle, holiday-ae-cross, holiday-ae-comforter). Navigation to /interactive-lesson/holiday-ae-covenant works correctly.

gift_certificate_cart_integration.details: Add to Cart button on Gift Certificate page adds gift cert to cart via CartContext.addGiftCertificateToCart(). Cart shows gift certificate item with correct name and price.
